title: SKX or DECK: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors looking for stocks in the Shoes and Retail Apparel sector might want to consider either Skechers (SKX) or Deckers (DECK). But which of these two stocks offers value investors a better bang for their buck right now?

title: KOOLABURRA BY UGG UNVEILS NEWEST BACK TO CAMPUS STYLE, TIZZEY
text: THE FOOTWEAR BRAND CELEBRATES THE LAUNCH WITH DONATION TO SCHOLARSHIP AMERICA TO HELP STUDENTS FULFILL THEIR COLLEGE DREAMS           GOLETA, Calif. , Aug. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- This fall, Southern California-based brand Koolaburra by UGG®  (a division of Deckers Brands [NYSE: DECK]) is excited to introduce our newest back-to-campus style, Tizzey.

title: Here's How Deckers (DECK) Is Steadily Expanding Presence
text: Deckers (DECK) is exploring untapped markets, innovating products and enhancing online shopping amid macroeconomic challenges.

title: HOKA Shoes Maker Deckers Outdoor Posts 45% Profit Growth
text: Deckers Outdoor's HOKA shoe sales grew 27% in its latest quarter. Shares are near a 52-week high.
